personal.preferred_title: Senior Python / AWS Data Platform Engineer

summary: Senior data and software engineering professional with 20+ years of enterprise experience building Python, SQL, cloud, and automation solutions for data-intensive platforms. Strong background in AWS data engineering, ETL/ELT pipelines, telemetry analytics, observability, documentation, and production-quality operational workflows. Hands-on experience with Python, SQL, AWS Glue, S3, Redshift, EC2/ECS, PySpark/Spark, data quality, and GenAI/agentic workflows; actively building Terraform, FastAPI, CI/CD, and API platform depth to support modern data science and AI engineering teams.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected and maintained Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual workflows with repeatable, auditable, and operations-ready data processing.

Built a hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Redshift, EC2/ECS containerized processing, and optimized Oracle schemas to support forecasting, reporting, and executive analytics.
Migrated heavy forecasting workloads using Prophet and scikit-learn from on-prem Oracle processing toward Redshift/cloud-scale execution, improving scalability for parallel capacity analysis.
Developed SQL-heavy reporting and analytics layers integrating TrueSight, CA Wily, and AppDynamics telemetry into unified datasets for operational decision-making and risk visibility.

Partnered with engineering, infrastructure, and stakeholder teams to define requirements, troubleshoot production issues, document workflows, and improve monitoring, alerting, and remediation practices.

Built GenAI Text-to-SQL and agentic workflow prototypes using Claude/Grok APIs and AWS Bedrock concepts, focusing on safe automation, structured JSON artifacts, quality gates, and human-reviewable outputs.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality platforms, improving visibility into user-facing performance and production reliability.
Led the FAST performance analytics initiative, mining real-user and synthetic monitoring data to generate optimization recommendations adopted by engineering teams.
Upgraded Dynatrace AppMon from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security with zero regression in production monitoring coverage.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace to correlate load-test behavior with APM evidence, supporting more reliable release and performance decisions.

experience.title: SME for CA APM / Senior Consultant
bullets: Served as CA APM SME across a large enterprise estate with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents, supporting high-scale monitoring and operational visibility.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and management modules that became standards across customer environments.
Automated performance reporting with Perl and Korn Shell scripts, reducing manual exports and improving repeatability of operational reporting.
Produced technical documentation, runbooks, training material, and operational guidance for engineering and client teams.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving data correctness and transaction performance.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation and testing frameworks to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.
Optimized core transaction processing and database access patterns, reducing physical hardware footprint while maintaining low-latency query behavior.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell, Java, C++, JSON, XML
skills.AWS & Cloud Data: Amazon S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, Amazon EC2, Amazon ECS, Athena concepts, AWS Bedrock concepts, CloudWatch concepts, Azure concepts
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, data ingestion, data processing, data warehousing, data modeling, data quality, reconciliation, reporting layers, metadata and documentation
skills.AI / Data Science Enablement: GenAI workflows, Text-to-SQL agents, Claude/Grok API integration, Bedrock concepts, Prophet, scikit-learn, forecasting pipelines, model-support datasets
skills.Backend / Platform Engineering: REST API design concepts, FastAPI learning projects, Pydantic contracts, reusable components, operational workflows, vulnerability/remediation awareness
skills.Infrastructure & Delivery: Docker, Git, GitHub Actions concepts, CI/CD pipeline design, Terraform beginner/actively learning, Agile/Scrum, technical documentation, runbooks
skills.Observability & Operations: Dynatrace AppMon, Gomez Synthetic Monitoring, CA APM/Introscope, BMC TrueSight/TSCO, AppDynamics, monitoring, alerting, troubleshooting, production support
skills.Databases: Oracle, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redshift, Oracle RAC, dimensional modeling, schema design, query optimization

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic automation pipeline using Python, Claude Code, Grok API, FAISS, sentence-transformers, structured JSON artifacts, quality gates, and application tracking. The system uses semantic duplicate detection, LLM-powered scoring, tailored artifact generation, and reproducible local scripts.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform Prototype
projects.description: Designed and implemented a serverless data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock concepts, Parquet, and PySpark to support query-ready datasets, Text-to-SQL exploration, and data engineering learning artifacts.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Created a forecasting engine using Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit to transform infrastructure telemetry into forward-looking capacity insights and stakeholder-facing analytics.
